scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:e2e
scripts.ci:web: npm run check && npm run test:core
scripts.ci:fabric: npm run fabric:resolve && npm run fabric:preflight && npm run fabric:build
scripts.test:core: node scripts/smoke-test.mjs && node scripts/regression-test.mjs && node scripts/bridge-integration-test.mjs && node scripts/local-bridge-test.mjs && node scripts/fabric-prototype-test.mjs && node scripts/release-prep-test.mjs && node scripts/github-actions-test.mjs
